caption: A screen recording shows a web browser open to a dark-themed conceptual map or diagramming tool. A small webcam feed in the upper right corner shows a man wearing a grey baseball cap. In the initial sequence, a few circular nodes are connected by lines, with one node featuring an image of a person and text that reads "Social blocking." As the sequence progresses, more circular nodes and connecting lines appear across the screen. These new nodes contain various icons and text, including "Social blocking," "Knowledge blocking," "Social networking," and "Invisible blocking." The diagram expands into a complex web of interconnected circles. Browser tabs at the top are visible, with titles such as "Trust & Learning by Systemini," "Future of Society by Systemini," and "Insights introduction to Kumu." The overall scene captures the real-time expansion of a digital mind map during a presentation.
